objective: Inspect the visible field-kit planner and patch the annotated DOM so the user understands what to do next.
instructions: Reason from the screenshot and supplied game state only.
Patch only the targets listed in the compact DOM contract.
Prefer one or two decisive patches over broad UI rewrites.
Every patch must include a short note explaining why it helps.
If something is missing, highlight the missing category or best gear card and explain it in note.
If the screen already looks successful, add a concise success note instead of warnings.
